headline: Nvidia-Tied AI Stocks Vertiv, Lumentum, Coherent To Join S&P 500 Index
summary: AI stocks Vertiv, Lumentum and Coherent, all with strong Nvidia ties, will join the S&P 500 before the open on March 23, along with EchoStar.

raw.headline: Nvidia-Tied AI Stocks Vertiv, Lumentum, Coherent To Join S&P 500 Index

headline: MU, LRCX, AMAT, GEV All Added to the S&P 100 As AI Stocks Gain Influence
summary: It’s the Super Bowl of index rebalancing tonight! The biggest news was the S&P 500 adding Vertiv (VRT), Lumentum (LITE), Coherent (COHR), and EchoStar (SATS). However, S&P Dow Jones Indices also rebalanced other indexes like the S&P 100 and S&P MidCap 400. Four stocks were added to the S&P 100 on the evening of March ... headline: Is It Worth Investing in Lam Research (LRCX) Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Lam Research (LRCX) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

headline: Shares of semiconductor companies are trading lower after reports suggested that the White House is planning more rules for foreign buyers of large quantities of US chips. The drop comes amid a broader decline in growth-oriented tech stocks.
